hooks.command: if jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'git push'; then touch /tmp/human-model-pushed; fi

hooks.rewakeMessage: A git push just completed. Check if a draft PR exists for the current branch — if not, create one with a description based on the branch commits; if one exists, update its description to reflect what the branch now actually does, and propose splitting if the scope has widened significantly.
